examples.title: Algorithm: Create Table
examples.description: Pseudocode to create a table in SQLite database
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CreateTable
INPUT: tableName, columns
OUTPUT: None

BEGIN
 1. Connect to SQLite database
 2. Create table with given name and columns
 3. Handle any errors
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of creating a table in SQLite database
